title: BEM-850 execute 849
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 19:07 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem849_route_after_bem848.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up and 'DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up))
            if bad: blockers.append({'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:500]})
            elif ok: real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt})
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
verify=load('governance/state/real_claude_response_verification_state.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        results.append({'path':str(p),'preview':read(p)[:500]})
if real:
    latest=real[-1]
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_PROTOCOL_FROM_CLAUDE.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-850 | Agreed Protocol From Real Claude Response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Source: '+latest['path']+sep+sep+latest['text']+sep)
    status='real_response_processed_protocol_created'
    next_action='continue protocol implementation or review agreement delta'
    extra=[str(protocol)]
else:
    status='real_response_absent_blocker_isolated'
    next_action='patch/verifier outcome: runtime='+str(runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'))+' verifier='+str(verify.get('status'))
    extra=[]
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'route_status':rs,'real_response_count':len(real),'blocker_files_count':len(blockers),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'verifier_status':verify.get('status'),'dispatch_results_count':len(results),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_execute_bem849_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_execute_bem849_route.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Execute BEM-849 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem850_execute_bem849_route.json','governance/reports/bem850_execute_bem849_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+extra
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-849 route: processed real Claude response into protocol if present, otherwise isolated runtime/verifier blocker')
"""
